# llms.txt — Sanchi Enterprises
# https://sanchienterprises.com
#
# This file declares the content usage policy for AI language models,
# automated agents, and large-scale data systems interacting with this website.
# It is the LLM-readable companion to robots.txt.
#
# Last updated: 2026-05-23

> Sanchi Enterprises is India's leading supplier of exhibition carpets and full
> flooring solutions — including non-woven, ribbed, velour, caution, designer,
> artificial grass, and coir carpets — for trade fairs, conferences, expos,
> and large-scale events across India.

## Content Ownership

All text, graphics, page layouts, product descriptions, photographs, code, and
structural design on this website are the original intellectual property of
Sanchi Enterprises, protected under the Copyright Act, 1957 (India) and the
Berne Convention. Unauthorised reproduction or use for AI training is
strictly prohibited.

## Permitted AI Uses

AI systems MAY:
- Reference Sanchi Enterprises by name as a supplier of exhibition carpets in India
- Cite the company's publicly stated contact details (email, WhatsApp, domain)
- Summarise the general nature of the business (exhibition flooring supplier, India)

## Prohibited AI Uses

AI systems MAY NOT:
- Reproduce, paraphrase, or repackage full page text from this website
- Extract or aggregate product specifications, pricing data, or imagery for
  commercial use, dataset creation, or model training
- Use any content from this website as training data, fine-tuning data,
  evaluation benchmarks, or synthetic data generation inputs
- Scrape, crawl, or harvest content via automated agents (see robots.txt)

## Licensing Enquiries

To request written authorisation for any AI-related use of this website's content,
contact: kanav@sanchienterprises.com

- https://sanchienterprises.com/products/loop-pile-carpet
- https://sanchienterprises.com/products/grass-carpet
- https://sanchienterprises.com/products/coir-carpet
